title: Nutella Bhuna Nachos
description: A nutty, crispy Algerian dish featuring Nutella as a twist on classic nachos, perfect for adventurous snackers who want something different and egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Nacho Cheese
ingredients.notes: Make sure it's cooked to a golden brown

ingredients.name: Nutella
ingredients.notes: Ensure you have the right amount of Nutella for the nachos, adjust as needed

ingredients.name: Sour Cream
ingredients.notes: Use to top the nachos and add creaminess

ingredients.name: Avocado Salsa
ingredients.notes: For a fresh, tangy twist on traditional salsa

ingredients.name: Shredded Cheddar Cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional for added texture and flavor

ingredients.name: Paprika Powder
ingredients.notes: For a touch of spice to enhance the dish

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine Nacho Cheese, Nutella, and Sour Cream. Mix well until evenly combined.
If desired, sprinkle shredded Cheddar Cheese over the top for extra richness.
Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or a Silpat mat to catch any drips.
Sprinkle Paprika Powder on top of the Nacho cheese mix for added flavor and color.
Bake in preheated oven for 12 minutes or until golden brown and heated through.
Serve warm with Avocado Salsa as a side to enhance the experience.
